creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Perhaps it's time to add https as primary address and ftp as fallback? :-)
https://bird.network.cz/download/bird-doc-2.0.8.tar.gz

We also seem to be missing build depends for m4 (gets pulled in by bison) and flex (gets pulled in by gmake)

https://gitlab.nic.cz/labs/bird/-/blob/master/configure.ac#L77

Best regards,
Daniel
